## Highlights

- **New `/ginee-update [<tag|branch|sha>]` skill.** Drives `install.{ps1,sh} --update-only` from inside your client — no more piped curl from the terminal. Triggers: `update ginee` / `upgrade the framework` / `pull the latest ginee` / `bump ginee to v<X>`.
- **Always surfaces the update plan + waits for explicit approval.** Never auto-runs. Refuses downgrades unless `--allow-downgrade` is passed.
- **Post-update report** — VERSION delta + CHANGELOG range + new `core/MIGRATIONS/*.md` files with their `Action required` excerpts + `local/index/manifest.yaml` SHA drift offer.
- **No installer changes.** Manual `./install.{ps1,sh} --update-only` continues to work unchanged.
- **Skill count 10 → 11** across CI workflow, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/CHEATSHEET.md`, the Claude pointer block.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.7.0...v0.8.0
